sourceTitle: Best Practices for Responsible AI Use at Columbia - CUIT
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Columbia University Information Technology has released University-wide best practices for responsible AI use. The guidance applies to faculty, students, researchers, and staff, and reinforces that while AI can support productivity and discovery, accountability remains with the human using the tool.
evidenceLocator: Firecrawl extraction from CUIT Best Practices for Responsible AI Use page, opening guidance paragraph
